name: agy-delegate
description: Delegate web searches and tasks to agy (Google Antigravity CLI). Grounded search with citations via Gemini 3.1/3.5 and GPT-OSS.

plugins.name: agy-delegate
plugins.description: Route web searches and AI tasks through agy with Gemini, Claude, and GPT-OSS models. Native search_web grounding with source citations.
